description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on push to main and master branches, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job on Mondays at 05:00 UTC. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It should use a matrix strategy to run a build job on a windows-2022 environment with Python 3.11 in Release configuration. The job should check out the code, generate a timestamp, configure a cache, set up Miniconda, create a Conda environment, and then build, test, and install Reaktoro using CMake and Ninja.
